title: lotodes andongense
intro: Lotodes andongense, also known as Andong water shield, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Hydrocharitaceae. It has been traditionally used in Korean medicine, where its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is rich in bioactive compounds such as flavonoids, phenolic acids, and glycosides, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, Lotodes andongense is often used in teas, infusions, and extracts, and is believed to have potential applications in the prevention and treatment of various diseases.
